title: bromus inermis var. arcticus
intro: Bromus inermis var. arcticus, also known as Arctic Bromegrass or smooth bromegrass, is a perennial grass native to the temperate regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arctic Bromegrass include relief from colds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as being a natural diuretic and expectorant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used fresh in salads, making it a versatile and valuable medicinal plant.
